title: OP_REGISTER response body
description: Successful registration response. registry_version is monotonic across the server's lifetime; it increments on every successful (non-dry-run) register that mutates state.

removed.description: Names of descriptors removed by this register call (typically force=true).

changed.description: Names of descriptors whose schema/agg changed.

diff.description: Per-descriptor diff summary (dry_run=true populates this with computed-but-not-applied state).
